contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, Salesforce opportunities, or just chatting about technology.
contact.football: Available for a football match in Rabat!

hobbies.title: Life Beyond the Code
hobbies.subtitle: I'm Yahya Zini—a developer by day, and an adventurer by choice.
hobbies.footballDesc: There's nothing like the energy of a football match. It's where I stay active, practice teamwork, and clear my head. If you're in Rabat and need a player, I'm ready.
hobbies.gamingDesc: Known as 'Big Man' in the gaming world. I enjoy sharing moments with friends, exploring virtual worlds, and building a community through streaming.
